records.ety: [Cf. D. draf the sediment of ale, Icel. draf draff, husks. Cf. 1st Drab.]

defs: Refuse; lees; dregs; the wash given to swine or cows; hogwash; waste matter.
quotes: Prodigals lately come from swine keeping, from eating draff and husks.
The draff and offal of a bygone age.
Mere chaff and draff, much better burnt.
